THEUNDERSTUDY-ANOTHER_BRICK_POWER.title: Another Brick
THEUNDERSTUDY-ANOTHER_BRICK_POWER.descri: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain {Amount} Block.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ANOTHER_BRICK_POWER.smartD: Whenever a debuff is applied to you, gain {Amount} Block.
THEUNDERSTUDY-APATHY_POWER.title: Apathy
THEUNDERSTUDY-APATHY_POWER.description: [gold]Invertible[/gold] debuffs applied to you are reduced by 1.
THEUNDERSTUDY-APATHY_POWER.smartDescript: [gold]Invertible[/gold] debuffs applied to you are reduced by {Amount}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-AUTO_TUNE_POWER.title: Auto Tune
THEUNDERSTUDY-AUTO_TUNE_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your turn, increase all [gold]Tuned[/gold] by {Amount}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-AUTO_TUNE_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your turn, increase all [gold]Tuned[/gold] by {Amount}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BRIGHT_SIDE_POWER.title: Bright Side
THEUNDERSTUDY-BRIGHT_SIDE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, [gold]Invert[/gold] this many.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BRIGHT_SIDE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, [gold]Invert[/gold] {Amount}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CENTER_STAGE_POWER.title: Center Stage
THEUNDERSTUDY-CENTER_STAGE_POWER.descrip: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Invert[/gold] this many.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CENTER_STAGE_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Invert[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRYING_OUT_LOUD_POWER.desc: Whenever a debuff of yours clears, gain {Amount} Vigor.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRYING_OUT_LOUD_POWER.smar: Whenever a debuff of yours clears, gain {Amount} Vigor.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DOUBLE_TIME_POWER.title: Double Time
THEUNDERSTUDY-DOUBLE_TIME_POWER.descript: All [gold]invertible[/gold] buff and debuff gains are applied an additional time.
THEUNDERSTUDY-DOUBLE_TIME_POWER.smartDes: All [gold]invertible[/gold] buff and debuff gains are applied [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional {Amount:plural:time|times}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ENJOY_THE_RIDE_POWER.title: Enjoy the Ride
THEUNDERSTUDY-ENJOY_THE_RIDE_POWER.descr: At the end of your turn, [gold]Invert[/gold] this many.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ENJOY_THE_RIDE_POWER.smart: At the end of your turn, [gold]Invert[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
THEUNDERSTUDY-FINAL_LESSON_POWER.title: The Final Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-FINAL_LESSON_POWER.descrip: You cannot lose HP. At the end of your turn, if this is your 3rd turn since gaining this, you die.
THEUNDERSTUDY-FINAL_LESSON_POWER.smartDe: You cannot lose HP. {Amount} turn(s) remaining before you die.
THEUNDERSTUDY-HELD_NOTE_POWER.title: Held Note
THEUNDERSTUDY-HELD_NOTE_POWER.descriptio: Turn-based buffs and debuffs no longer decrease by 1 each turn.
THEUNDERSTUDY-HELD_NOTE_POWER.smartDescr: Turn-based buffs and debuffs no longer decrease by 1 each turn.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTERMISSION_POWER.title: Intermission
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTERMISSION_POWER.descrip: When you end your turn without playing any card, play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTERMISSION_POWER.smartDe: When you end your turn without playing any card, play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INVERT_TRACKER_POWER.title: Invert Tracker
THEUNDERSTUDY-JADED_POWER.title: Jaded
THEUNDERSTUDY-JADED_POWER.description: Lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your next turn. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-JADED_POWER.smartDescripti: Lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your next turn. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-LIMITED_POWER.title: Limited
THEUNDERSTUDY-LIMITED_POWER.description: Draw 1 fewer card at the start of your next turn. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-LIMITED_POWER.smartDescrip: Draw 1 fewer card at the start of your next turn. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-MASTER_FORM_POWER.title: Master Form
THEUNDERSTUDY-MASTER_FORM_POWER.descript: When attacks or skills without [gold]Replay[/gold] are played, they gain [gold]Replay[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-MASTER_FORM_POWER.smartDes: When attacks or skills without [gold]Replay[/gold] are played, they gain [gold]Replay[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUSCLE_MEMORY_POWER.title: Muscle Memory
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUSE_POWER.title: Muse
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUSE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to this many cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MUSE_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MY_OWN_LESSON_POWER.title: My Own Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-MY_OWN_LESSON_POWER.descri: Whenever you gain an [gold]Invertible[/gold] debuff, gain a buff instead. Whenever you gain an [gold]Invertible[/gold] buff, gain nothing instead.
THEUNDERSTUDY-MY_OWN_LESSON_POWER.smartD: Whenever you gain an [gold]Invertible[/gold] debuff, gain a buff instead. Whenever you gain an [gold]Invertible[/gold] buff, gain nothing instead.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ONE_TAKE_POWER.title: One Take
THEUNDERSTUDY-ONE_TAKE_POWER.description: Decrease all card costs by 1. Apply [gold]Unplayable[/gold] to every played card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-ONE_TAKE_POWER.smartDescri: Decrease all card costs by {Amount}. Apply [gold]Unplayable[/gold] to every played card.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFECTIONISM_POWER.title: Perfectionism
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFECTIONISM_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to this many cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFECTIONISM_POWER.smartD: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Tuned[/gold] to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PUNISHED_POWER.title: Punished
THEUNDERSTUDY-PUNISHED_POWER.description: Every turn, apply this many of a random [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-PUNISHED_POWER.smartDescri: Every turn, apply {Amount} of a random [gold]invertible[/gold] debuff to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-RESOURCEFUL_POWER.title: Resourceful
THEUNDERSTUDY-RESOURCEFUL_POWER.descript: The first time you have an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card in hand each turn, draw this many cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-RESOURCEFUL_POWER.smartDes: The first time you have an [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card in hand each turn, draw {Amount} cards.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REVERB_POWER.title: Reverb
THEUNDERSTUDY-REVERB_POWER.description: When you use [gold]Vigor[/gold], you keep it.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REVERB_POWER.smartDescript: When you use [gold]Vigor[/gold], you keep it. Lasts [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REWARDED_POWER.title: Rewarded
THEUNDERSTUDY-REWARDED_POWER.description: Every turn, apply this many of a random [gold]invertible[/gold] buff to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REWARDED_POWER.smartDescri: Every turn, apply {Amount} of a random [gold]invertible[/gold] buff to yourself.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SECOND_LESSON_POWER.title: The Second Lesson
THEUNDERSTUDY-SECOND_LESSON_POWER.descri: Each turn, some cards will have an [red][sine]Order[/sine][/red]. Obeying grants [gold]Rewarded[/gold]; disobeying grants [gold]Punished[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-SECOND_LESSON_POWER.smartD: Each turn, some cards will have an [red][sine]Order[/sine][/red]. Obeying grants [gold]Rewarded[/gold]; disobeying grants [gold]Punished[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-SHAKEN_POWER.title: Shaken
THEUNDERSTUDY-SHAKEN_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, add [gold]Unplayable[/gold] to all [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] in your hand. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-SHAKEN_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of your turn, add [gold]Unplayable[/gold] to all [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] in your hand. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-STAGE_PRESENCE_POWER.title: Stage Presence

THEUNDERSTUDY-STAGE_PRESENCE_POWER.smart: At the start of your turn, [gold]Swap[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-STEREO_POWER.title: Stereo
THEUNDERSTUDY-TENSION_POWER.title: Tension
THEUNDERSTUDY-TENSION_POWER.description: At the end of its turn, this creature takes damage equal to its Tension, then it's removed. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-TENSION_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of its turn, this creature takes damage equal to its Tension, then it's removed. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-TUNED_LOCK_POWER.title: Tuned Lock
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDOOM_POWER.title: Undoom
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDOOM_POWER.description: At the end of the opponent's turn, if this creature has less than [blue]this much[/blue] HP, it heals up to that much. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDOOM_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of the opponent's turn, if this creature has less than [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, it heals up to that much. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].

THEUNDERSTUDY-UNJADED_POWER.smartDescrip: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} at the start of your next turn. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNLIMITED_POWER.title: Unlimited
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNLIMITED_POWER.descriptio: At the start of your next turn, draw until your hand is full. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNLIMITED_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of your next turn, draw until your hand is full. [gold]Invertible[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNSHAKEN_POWER.title: Unshaken
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNSHAKEN_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold] in your hand. [gold]Invertible[/gold].

THEUNDERSTUDY-UNTAINTED_POWER.title: Untainted
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNTAINTED_POWER.descriptio: This creature takes [blue]this much[/blue] less damage from [gold]Attacks[/gold] this turn. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNTAINTED_POWER.smartDescr: This creature takes [blue]this much[/blue] less damage from [gold]Attacks[/gold] this turn. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].

THEUNDERSTUDY-UNTENSION_POWER.descriptio: At the end of its turn, this creature heals HP equal to its Untension, then it's removed. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].

THEUNDERSTUDY-UNVULNERABLE_POWER.descrip: Unvulnerable creatures take [blue]25%[/blue] less damage from Attacks. Cancels out with Vulnerable. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNVULNERABLE_POWER.smartDe: Unvulnerable creatures take [blue]25%[/blue] less damage from Attacks. Cancels out with Vulnerable. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNWEAK_POWER.title: Unweak
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNWEAK_POWER.description: Unweakened creatures deal [blue]25%[/blue] more damage with Attacks. Cancels out with Weak. [gold]Invertible[/gold]. [gold]Swappable[/gold].

THEUNDERSTUDY-BALANCED_POWER.title: Balanced
THEUNDERSTUDY-BALANCED_POWER.description: Whenever a card becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold], remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from 1 random attack or skill in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BALANCED_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever a card becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold], remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from {Amount} random attack or skill in hand.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BALANCED_CHOICE_POWER.desc: Whenever a card becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold], remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from 1 attack or skill of your choice in hand.
